ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manuscripts" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the manuscript */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the manuscript (e.g., Under Review, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution associated with the submission */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the manuscript is submitted to */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., original article, review article) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the manuscript */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the manuscript */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language of the manuscript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES peer_review_journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Reviewer’s affiliation */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the reviewer */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language the reviewer is associated with */,
  "expertise_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords of the reviewer’s expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer submitting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current status of the review (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "review_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review quality */,
  "review_completion_time" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  "editor_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_review_journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "editor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the journal’s editor */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal’s editor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript assigned to the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer assigned to the manuscript */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the review to be completed */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment */,
  "reminder_sent" TEXT /* Date a reminder was sent to the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_assignments_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_assignments_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES review_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_expertise" (
  "expertise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expertise entry */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer associated with the expertise */,
  "field_of_expertise" TEXT /* Field of expertise of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expertise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewer_expertise_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Reviewer comments on the manuscript */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the reviewer’s performance */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Editor’s recommendation for future assignments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role’s responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)
